title: BEM-867 patch queue step log
objective:
Run script:
"""
runner = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
old = '''      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue after commit
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true

'''
new = '''      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue after commit
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/runtime/curator_dispatch
          echo "# BEM-867 queue processor heartbeat" > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
          echo "Status: STARTED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_LOG.txt 2>&1 || echo "PROCESSOR_FAILED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
          echo "Status_after: FINISHED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md

'''
if old in text:
    text = text.replace(old, new)
elif 'BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT' not in text:
    text = text.replace('          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true', '          mkdir -p governance/runtime/curator_dispatch
          echo "# BEM-867 queue processor heartbeat" > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
          echo "Status: STARTED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_LOG.txt 2>&1 || echo "PROCESSOR_FAILED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
          echo "Status_after: FINISHED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md')
runner.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_STEP_LOG_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 queue step log patched
Status: PATCHED
Log: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_LOG.txt
Heartbeat: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_HEARTBEAT.md
', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(runner))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched BEM867 queue processor heartbeat/log')
"""
No issue comments.
